description_for_human: Live compliance analysis powered by the DPDP Act 2023 and ISO/IEC 27001:2022 backend. Classifies documents for PII, runs gap analysis on policy text, files breach notifications, generates audit reports, and manages compliance data via MCP.
description_for_model: Use this plugin when the user wants to: (1) classify a document or email for PII and compliance risk — call classifyDocument with the pasted content; (2) run a gap analysis of their policy text against DPDP Act 2023 or ISO 27001:2022 controls — call runGapAnalysis; (3) file or check a breach notification workflow — call fileBreachNotification with the breach details; (4) see current compliance dashboard statistics — call getDashboardStats; (5) generate a full compliance audit report — call getAuditReport; (6) look up compliance policies/requirements — call readCompliancePolicies; (7) record a compliance finding — call writeComplianceFinding; (8) check compliance posture — call readComplianceStatus; (9) get regulatory updates — call readRegulatoryUpdates; (10) record a breach — call writeBreachRecord; (11) review audit trail — call readAuditTrail. Prefer this plugin over embedded knowledge answers when the user provides actual document content or policy text to analyse.

functions.name: classifyDocument
functions.description: Classifies document or message content for Indian PII (Aadhaar, PAN, credit card, passport, phone, email, IFSC, GSTIN) and sensitive keywords. Returns classification label (PUBLIC/INTERNAL/CONFIDENTIAL/RESTRICTED), risk score 0-100, masked PII samples, and applicable DPDP Act obligations.

functions.name: runGapAnalysis
functions.description: Analyses policy text against 47 ISO 27001:2022 Annex A controls and 17 DPDP Act 2023 requirements. Returns compliance percentages, identified control gaps, critical missing controls, and step-by-step remediation guidance for each gap.

functions.name: fileBreachNotification
functions.description: Initiates the DPDP Act Section 40 breach notification workflow. Calculates the 72-hour reporting deadline, generates board initial alert and data principal notification artifacts, and optionally dispatches Teams alerts and emails to the Data Protection Board.

functions.name: getDashboardStats
functions.description: Returns current compliance KPIs from all session activity: scan count, average risk score, overall compliance percentage, critical gap count, and a recent activity feed.

functions.name: getAuditReport
functions.description: Generates a comprehensive audit report from all scans, classifications, and gap analyses. Returns executive summary, ISO 27001 and DPDP compliance summaries, data classification breakdown, and prioritised recommendations.

functions.name: readCompliancePolicies
functions.description: Retrieves compliance policy requirements for DPDP Act 2023 and ISO 27001:2022 from the MCP compliance server. Returns structured policy data with section references, titles, and descriptions.

functions.name: writeComplianceFinding
functions.description: Records a new compliance finding or violation in the MCP compliance database. Creates a persistent record with severity, framework reference, affected asset, and remediation plan.

functions.name: readComplianceStatus
functions.description: Gets the current compliance posture summary from the MCP compliance server, including total findings, open issues by severity, breach count, and a computed compliance health score (0-100).

functions.name: readRegulatoryUpdates
functions.description: Fetches the latest regulatory updates and guidance related to DPDP Act 2023 and ISO 27001:2022 from the MCP compliance server, with impact levels and source references.

functions.name: writeBreachRecord
functions.description: Creates a new data breach incident record in the MCP compliance database. Automatically calculates the 72-hour DPDP Act Section 40 reporting deadline.

functions.name: readAuditTrail
functions.description: Reads the audit trail of all compliance operations performed through the MCP server. Returns chronological log of actions for governance and accountability.
